perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white fuzzy bucket hat and a white crop top stands in front of Costco shelves. She holds a light green shell-shaped ceramic plate while large text overlays appear on the screen. (2) She moves to the product shelf to point at a price tag of $999. She then demonstrates various items from a dinnerware set: a large blue and white striped plate, a shell plate, a mug with a red fish-tail handle, and a bowl with an anchor logo inside. (3) She picks up a large, heavy box containing the full 16-piece set, smiling at the camera and struggling slightly with the weight before posing with the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone about a 'Black Friday' deal and a price of 63 dollars. (2) The main speaker continues to describe the details of the tableware. A second female voice is heard off-screen reacting with enthusiastic interjections like 'Wow' and 'So cute'. Ceramic clinking sound effects (SFX) are audible as the items are handled. (3) The music and vocals maintain a consistent, energetic level through the end of the clip as the speaker summarizes the value of the set.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '黑五好康' (Black Friday Goodies) - Hook text in bold yellow/orange. (2) '大家搶著買' (Everyone is rushing to buy) - Decorative text emphasizing popularity. (3) '黑五價格扯爆 63元餐具好誇張' (Black Friday price is insane, $63 tableware is crazy) - Main headline text. (4) Functional subtitles are provided at the bottom of the screen to translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Detailed Product Demonstration -> Final Value Summary/Box Display

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 male shopper blurred in the background aisle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white NY Yankees branded bucket hat, a white long-sleeved crop top, and blue jeans with knee cutouts. She is carrying a brown Gucci shoulder bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse retail shelves filled with boxes of dinnerware. Visible Costco price tags and promotional 'Black Friday' signage.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence (Product Detail) -> Conclusion (Total Value)
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional consumer guide and review designed to drive foot traffic to Costco during Black Friday. By breaking down the price of a 16-piece dinnerware set into an 'insanely low' per-piece cost ($63), the creator leverages social proof and scarcity (limited time deals) to encourage viewers to purchase the items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstration, explicit price mention, and clear branding of the retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style text overlays and rapid-fire speech patterns.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of luxury items (Gucci bag) juxtaposed with bargain hunting at a warehouse club is a common 'wealthy but smart shopper' trope in lifestyle vlogging.
